headline: Q1 2026 Midstream/MLP Buybacks: Steady Start To Year
summary: Quarterly equity repurchases for midstream MLPs and corporations remained healthy in Q1. Six constituents in the broad Alerian Midstream Energy Index spent a combined $818 mln on repurchases

headline: MPLX: 7.6% Yield, 12% Distribution Growth, But I'm Not Buying (Downgrade)
summary: MPLX LP offers a near 8% yield with a multi-year plan for 12.5% distribution growth. Click here to read why MPLX stock is a Hold.
